card.name: CA06 Land fixing
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land or Oasis card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. {T}: Add {C}, then scry 2.

card.name: CW01 Votive Soul
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: CW02 Two Suns Fighter
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. When this creature dies, if it attacked or blocked this turn, you gain 2 life.

card.name: CW03 Priest of the Angel's Path
card.text: {1}{WU}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: CW04 Envoy of New Ways
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you may return a land you control to its owner's hand. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CW05 Conflicted Angel
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 1.

card.name: CW06 Coordinated Infantry
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other Warriors, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CW07 Cruel Adjudicator
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) Flying When this creature betrays another permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target artifact or creature. Then if the betrayed permanent was a creature, you draw a card.

card.name: CW08 Phalanx Commander
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW09 Broken Lands Monitor
card.text: Flying The first time each turn one or more creatures an opponent controls becomes tapped, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW10 Blessed Revivalist
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature enters, return up to one artifact, creature or enchantment with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Then if this creature betrayed a permanent, untap the permanent returned this way.

card.name: CW11 Mindless Servant
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, tap it unless there are four or more different names among lands you control.

card.name: CW12 Swift Response
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: CW13 Deity's Presence
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent with mana value 3 or less an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CW14 Ready Bows
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: CW15 Review // Revise
card.text:
Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Target permanent gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: CW16 Feeding Time
card.text: Create three 1/1 white and black Cat creature tokens. Scry 1.

card.name: CU01 Soul Administrator
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, you may draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: CU02 Aven Theorist
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: CU03 Dedicated Scribe
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a planeswalker or player, you draw a card.

card.name: CU04 Seshen Pollinators
card.text: Flying {1}{U}: Move a counter from target permanent to another target permanent. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: CU05 Zenith Hunter
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. This ability triggers no more than twice each turn.

card.name: CU06 Frozen Sands Cadre
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever a Zombie you control deals combat damage to a planeswalker or player, you may scry 1.

card.name: CU07 Vindictive Sphinx
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may pay {U}. When you do, return target tapped creature you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: CU08 Avatar of Sab-Sunen
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a counter from this creature: Choose one. Activate only once each turn. — • Target creature gains flying until end of turn. • Untap target creature.

card.name: CU09 Protected // From Reality
card.text:
Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Any number of target players each mill 3 cards.

card.name: CU10 Nullification Chant
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as a counter was put on or removed from a permanent you control this turn. Counter target spell.

card.name: CU11 Ancient Prophecies // Predicting Ruin
card.text:
Draw two cards, then discard a card.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Tap or untap target creature. Scry 2.

card.name: CU12 Meditative Wisdom
card.text: Draw three cards, then discard a card.

card.name: CU13 Turned to Stone
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Tap enchanted creature at the beginning of its controller's upkeep step. Enchanted creature has no abilities while tapped.

card.name: CU14 Deliver // An Ultimatum
card.text:
Target creature's controller puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of its owner's library.
---
Aftermath Target creature's controller puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: CU15 Ships Passing // In the Night
card.text:
Choose one — • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. • Return target creature to its owner's hand. Draw a card.
---
Aftermath Target creature can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: CU16 Sailskiff
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, scry 2, then target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: CB01 Serrated Scorpion
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent and you gain 2 life.

card.name: CB02 Fleshform Serket
card.text: Deathtouch Pay 3 life: Untap this creature. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: CB03 Sentimental Thug
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, if an opponent lost life this turn, you may surveil 2.

card.name: CB04 Canopic Harvester
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card with mana value 3 or less from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: CB05 Carcass Collector
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control or exile a creature card from your graveyard. When you do, create a tapped black 1/1 Zombie creature token.

card.name: CB06 Ferocious Cobra
card.text: {R}: This creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: CB07 Ifnir Farseer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a Talisman artifact token that's all colors with "When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you scry 1."

card.name: CB08 Returned Master
card.text: When this creature enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life. {2}{U}: Exile target Zombie you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: CB09 Burial Chamber Guardian
card.text: Defender, menace {1}{B}: This creature loses defender and gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CB10 Eternal Moloch // Of Death
card.text:
Create a 3/3 black Zombie Lizard creature token.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Destroy target creature or planeswalker with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: CB11 Mantle of Shards
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: CB12 Selling Lives
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards.

card.name: CB13 Moment of Weakness
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if an opponent lost life this turn. Target opponent discards two cards.

card.name: CB15 Disintegrating Wrappings
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you pay {1} more to cast it. Exile target creature.

card.name: CB16 Spinal Diviner
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, choose one — • Target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. • You draw a card and lose 2 life.

card.name: UB12 Betrayal of Secrets
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. If you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, you gain 2 life.

card.name: CR01 Rage-cursed Returned
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any noncreature target.

card.name: CR02 Frontier Messenger
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: CR03 Maahestet Champion
card.text: When this creature attacks, if two or more other creatures that share a creature type with it also attack, it gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: CR04 Shadowseller
card.text: Haste Pay 2 life: Copy target activated ability of a source you control. Activate only once each turn, and only during your turn.

card.name: CR05 Bloodsand Lich
card.text: This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it as long as an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: CR06 Role Model Sergeant
card.text: {1}{RW}: Target Warrior gains first strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CR07 Ka-Blade Champion
card.text: Trample {1}{R}: Choose one. Activate only once each turn, and only if this creature attacked this turn. — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Attach target Equipment to target permanent its owner controls that it could equip.

card.name: CR08 Avenging Minotaur
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may pay {U}. When you do, return target instant and/or sorcery from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CR09 Starving Sandwurm
card.text: Trample

card.name: CR10 No Pain // No Gain
card.text:
This spell deals 2 damage to any target.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Discard a card, then draw two cards.

card.name: CR11 Swollen // Ego
card.text:
Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
---
Aftermath Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: CR12 Stealing the Beacon
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as you've activated an ability of a nonland card this turn. Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: CR13 Abrade
card.text: Choose one — • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: CR14 Fire // Power
card.text:
This spell deals 4 damage to target permanent.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Create a 3/3 red Elemental Cat creature with haste.

card.name: CR15 Holy Pyre
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to any target. Then if there are two or more colors among Warriors you control, you gain 3 life.

card.name: CR16 Helm of Hazoret
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, it deals 1 damage to each player, then you surveil 1.

card.name: CG01 Apepisw Gate
card.text: Defender Whenever a player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CG02 Oashra Vitalist
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: CG03 Exploring Couple
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CG04 Giant Ibis
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter and a Reach counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this creature onto another target creature you control.

card.name: CG05 Instructor Huntress
card.text: {2}{RG}: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CG06 Boat-climber Cobra
card.text: Deathtouch This creature assigns combat damage to planeswalkers and players equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: CG07 Seeker of Lost Species
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {G}{W}, {T}: Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: CG08 Hippo Family
card.text: When this creature enters, if one or more counters were removed or put on a creature you control this turn, choose one — • Exile any number of cards from target player's graveyard. • Gain 3 life and scry 1.

card.name: CG09 Avenging Elephant
card.text: Trample {1}{R}: Destroy target noncreature, nonbasic permanent with mana value 2 or less. Activate only once each turn, and only if this creature dealt combat damage to a planeswalker or player this turn.

card.name: CG10 Oasis Sentinel
card.text: This creature gets +X/+X and can't be blocked by creatures with power equal to or less than {X}, where X is the number of Oasis lands you control.

card.name: CG11 Maul
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: CG12 Hunting Party
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment with mana value less than the greatest power among creatures you control. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: CG14 City's Founding
card.text: Search your library for a basic land or Oasis card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: CG15 Night Market
card.text: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the greatest toughness among creatures you control. You may reveal any number of creature and/or land cards from among them and put the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: CG16 Ghrin-Danu's Servitors
card.text: Create three 1/1 Elemental creature tokens that are all colors.

card.name: UG13 Nerves // Of Steel
card.text:
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains haste and trample until end of turn.
---
Aftermath Target permanent you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: UG12 noncreature (supp. GW)
card.text: Permanent Should allow creatures your control with Defender to attack as they didn't have it.

card.name: UW04 3-cost crea (for WB
card.text: Creates a Talisman

card.name: UW05 Vessel of Purity
card.text: Vigilance Schism — {T}, Tap two or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If five or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: UW06 Callous Charioteer
card.text: Reach Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, it gains haste, vigilance and trample until end of turn.

card.name: UW07 4-cost crea (for W/B)
card.text: has Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.)

card.name: UU05 Vessel of Genius
card.text: Flying, ward {1} Schism — {T}, Tap two or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If five or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: UU06 Pillar-Leaper Sphinx
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, choose one — • Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. • Draw a card.

card.name: UB02 2-cost Creature (for B/G)
card.text: has activated or triggered ability that costs at least bg hybrid or {G}

card.name: UB04 Vessel of Darkness
card.text: Menace Schism — {T}, Tap two or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If five or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: UB06 Omnivorous Exhumer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, it gains flying until end of turn. Whenever another creature dies, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: UR01 Taw-honed Fighter
card.text: This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it as long as you've attacked this turn. When this creature enters, scry 1.

card.name: UR04 Vessel of Wrath
card.text: Haste Schism — {T}, Tap two or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If five or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: UR09 Darkstorm Bolt
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as any player cast a spell from a graveyard this turn. This spell deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: UR11 Shining Bright // Into the Night
card.text:
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains haste until end of turn.
---
Aftermath Damage can't be prevented this turn. Players can't gain life this turn. If a creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: UG06 Vessel of Nature
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {G}. Schism — {T}, Tap two or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If five or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: RW02 Converted Seraph
card.text: Flying, vigilance Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, destroy target tapped creature. If it betrays an Angel or a legendary creature, you may instead destroy all tapped creatures.

card.name: RU01 graveyard spell copier
card.text: Ward {1} {2}{UR}, {T}: Copy target noncreature spell that was cast from a graveyard. You may choose new targets for the copy. This ability costs {1} less to activate if that spell had Aftermath.

card.name: RU03 Interdiction Angel
card.text: Flash This spell can't be countered. Flying When this creature enters, tap up to one other target creature.

card.name: RR03 Lazotep Dragon
card.text: Flying, haste Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, it deals 2 damage to any nonplayer target. If a multicolor permanent was betrayed this way, surveil 2.

card.name: RR06 Another One // Bites the Dust
card.text:
Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."
---
Aftermath This spell deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: RG01 Hesep Tender
card.text: {T}: Untap target land and put a Paradise counter on it. As long as that land has a Paradise counter on it, it's a colorless Oasis land with "{T}: Add one mana of any color and you gain 1 life." It loses all other abilities and land subtypes.

card.name: MW01 Tekhen, Ancient Spiresoul
card.text: Flying Lands you control are artifact Treasures in addition to their other types and have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color." Whenever a Treasure enters under your control, if you don't control a Treasure with the same name, draw a card.

card.name: CA01 2-cost Smoother
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2.

card.name: CA02Three-mana creature
card.text: {1}: This creature becomes the color of your choice in addition to its other colors until end of turn. When this creature enters or dies, exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: CA03 Grounds Guardian
card.text: When this creature attacks, if you've cast an artifact spell or two or more non-creature spells this turn, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: CA04 Private Feast
card.text: When this artifact enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one creature you control. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile target creature.

card.name: CA05 Gleaming Capstone
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {1}: This permanent becomes a land and loses any other card type. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: UA04 Blood of the Pious
card.text: The first time each turn you sacrifice a creature, create a Treasure token.

card.name: CL01 Winding River
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Oasis land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: UL01 W-dominant Oasis
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, you gain 1 life and scry 1. {T}: Add {W}. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: UL02 Port Kharteru
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 2. {T}: Add {U}. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {G}.

card.name: UL03 B-dominant Oasis
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B}. {1}, {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: UL04 Sulfurous Baths
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, surveil 1. {T}: Add {R}. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: UL05 Shefet Shrublands
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, you gain 2 life. {T}: Add {G}. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {R}.

card.name: UW15 noncreature (supp. WG)
card.text: Maybe should have Aftermath, though it wouldn't be integral to the card

card.name: UG15 noncreature (supp. ALL)
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land is a 0/1 Elemental creature that's all colors, and has Indestructible and "{T}: Add two mana of any one color." It's still a land.

card.name: RX07 Mythic Oasis Land
card.text: doesn't search, and does gain life, scry and or draw in some way

card.name: RX08 Foreboding Gate
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control 3 or more Oasis permanents. {6}, {T}: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Activate only if you control 6 or more Oasis permanents.

card.name: RM01 Darux, Miasma of Passion
card.text: Flying When Darux dies, if an opponent lost life this turn, you may put him on top of your library. Whenever an opponent attacks, that player loses 1 life for each untapped creature they control that didn't enter this turn.

card.name: RM01 Gah-Api, Life's Hope
card.text: Haste, indestructible, trample Gah-Api can't attack or block unless you've activated an ability of a creature this turn. The first time each turn you attack with one or more creatures, untap up to that many lands you control. {12}{R}{G}: Creatures you control get +6/+6 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: RM01 Ghrin-Danu, Watchful Mother
card.text: Lifelink When Ghrin-Danu dies, if a land entered under your control this turn, you may return her to her owner's hand. You may play an additional land on each of your turns.

card.name: RM01 Hazoret, Zealous Survivor
card.text: Haste, indestructible, menace Hazoret can't attack or block unless you've cast a creature spell this turn. Warrior spells you cast can't be countered. Warriors you control have hexproof.

card.name: RM01 Ketramose, Virtuous Sacrifice
card.text: Indestructible Ketramose can't attack or block unless a creature died this turn. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard.

card.name: RM01 Sab-Sunen, Flow of Time
card.text: Indestructible, reach, trample, vigilance Sab-Sunen can't attack or block unless one or more counters were put on or removed from a permanent this turn. At the beginning of each of your postcombat main phases, there is an additional beginning phase after this phase. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps.)

card.name: RM01 Scarab God, Wrath of Eons
card.text: Menace, indestructible Scarab God can't attack or block unless you control a Zombie. At the beginning of your end step, target player sacrifices a creature. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 2/2 black Zombie.

card.name: RM01 Serra, the Returned
card.text: Flying, indestructible, vigilance Serra can't attack or block unless two or more creatures you don't control became tapped this turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, tap up to one target creature you don't control and untap up to one target creature you control.

card.name: RM01 Snehem, God of Locusts
card.text: Indestructible Snehem can't attack or block unless you've drawn two or more cards this turn. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, you may pay {UR}. When you do, draw a card and create a 1/1 blue and red Insect creature token with flying.

card.name: RM01 Wasmawt, Inevitable Death
card.text: Indestructible, deathtouch Wasmawt can't attack or block unless you control a creature with defender. Whenever a creature dies, untap and put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: CB14 Feast on Flesh
card.text: Target creature you don't control gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If you control a Zombie, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: RB05 Coming Forth by Night
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a card that was put into a graveyard from anywhere this turn. Put target artifact, creature, or planeswalker card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: UR13 Wide Swing
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.

card.name: CG13 Adjust to Abundance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or remove a counter from a permanent you control. Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: UA01 Lazotep Blade
card.text: Hexproof Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Whenever equipped creature attacks, it gains ward {2} until your next turn. Equip {2}

card.name: UA02 Icon of Unity
card.text: Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell that's one or more colors, if it's a color you haven't cast this turn, you gain 1 life.

card.name: UA03 Spellfire Khopesh
card.text: Equipped creature has first strike and prowess. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Equip {2}

card.name: UR06 Daruxian Spinescourger
card.text: Flying, haste, first strike

card.name: UB05 Mindstab Ravager
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: UB08 Vile Judge
card.text: When this creature enters the battlefield, destroy target creature you don't control. You gain X life and each opponent loses X life, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: UM01 BR-1 Boiling Bloodlust
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Whenever a creature enters under your control this turn, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it. • Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast this turn as long as an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: UM01 WB-1 Chamber of New Anointment
card.text: Whenever you betray a permanent, you gain 2 life. Then if that permanent was a creature, put a charge counter on this artifact. {2}{W}{B}, {T}, Remove X charge counters from this artifact: Return target creature card with mana value less than or equal to X plus 2 from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UM01 UR-1 Divine Attunement
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 2. Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast. The first time each turn you cast a spell with Aftermath, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: UM01 BG-1 First Altar of Wasmawt
card.text: Whenever a creature with toughness greater than its power enters under your control, you may draw a card and lose 1 life. This triggers only once each turn. {2}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature you control: Target opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the sacrificed creature's toughness.

card.name: UM01 RG-1 Mistress of Leashes
card.text: Haste The first time each turn you attack, untap a land you control. {1}{R}{G}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: UM01 UB-1 Officiant of the Arisen
card.text: Zombies you control get +1/+1 and have ward {1}. When this creature dies, if it isn't a Zombie, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control. It becomes a Zombie in addition to its other creature types.

card.name: UM01 GU-1 Scion of New Rivers
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, remove all counters from this creature. If no counters were removed this way, put two +1/+1 counters on it. Otherwise, add two mana of any one color.

card.name: UM01 WU-1 Serra's Servant
UM01 RW-1 Training Regimen
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 red and white Human Warrior creature token. Warriors you control have haste and vigilance.

card.name: UM01 GW-1 Walking Oasis
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for up to one land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. Whenever a land enters under your control, if you don't control another land with the same name, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: UM01 WU-2 Bastion of Serra
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may have target opponent create a 0/1 colorless Wish enchantment creature with defender. When you don't, scry 2. {2}{WU}: Tap target creature you don't control.

card.name: UM01 UB-2 Crucible of Eternity
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature card was put into a graveyard from anywhere this turn, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token. {2}{U}, Sacrifice a permanent: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: UM01 BR-2 Bloodblade Naga
card.text: Menace Whenever you attack, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: UM01 RG-2 Priest of Gah-Api
card.text: Activated abilities of other permanents you control cost {1} less to activate.This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {2}{R}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery, and only if you've attacked this turn.

card.name: UM01 GW-2 Voyage to New Homes
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns as long as it doesn't share a name with a land you control.

card.name: UM01 WB-2 High Priest of Ketramose
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, you may draw a card and lose 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, create a 1/1 black and white Cat creature token.

card.name: UM01 UR-2 Tjuf, Herald of Snehem
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If that spell was cast from a graveyard and had Aftermath, creatures you control get +1/+1 instead.

card.name: UM01 BG-2 Hofan Slithermaster
card.text: Other creatures you control get +0/+1. At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {1}{BG}. If you do, create a 1/1 green and black Snake creature token.

card.name: UM01 RW-2 Chariot Commander
card.text: First strike Warrior spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you attack, if another Warrior is attacking, you may scry 1.

card.name: UM01 GU-2 Flow State
card.text: Permanents you control with counters on them have trample, ward {1}, and "{T}: Add one mana of any color." {1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target permanent. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Wish ASM
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.)

card.name: Elemental Cat ASM
card.text: Haste
